args.code: (async()=>{ const r=await window.__DXM_AUTOMATION_V1_READONLY_PREFLIGHT__(); if(!r.pass||(r.blockers&&r.blockers.length)) return JSON.stringify({clicked:false,reason:"preflight not pass",pass:r.pass,blockers:r.blockers}); const buttons=[...document.querySelectorAll("button")].filter(b=>b.offsetParent!==null&&b.innerText.trim()==="保存并移入待发布"); const btn=buttons[0]; if(!btn) return JSON.stringify({clicked:false,reason:"save-to-wait button not found"}); btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); const text=document.body.innerText||""; return JSON.stringify({clicked:true,url:location.href,successModal:text.includes("产品已移入待发布")||text.includes("待发布"),snippet:(text.match(/产品已移入待发布[^\n]*/)||[""])[0]});})()
